title: Deep Review of Nanobot Capabilities
acceptance_criteria: Nanobot agent loop and message flow mapped
Extension points for new tools identified
Capabilities that CAN be reused listed
Capabilities that MUST be built from scratch listed
description: Perform comprehensive review of nanobot codebase to understand: (1) What capabilities already exist and can be reused (file tools, shell tools, WhatsApp channel, agent loop, message bus, subagent spawning), (2) What are the extension points for adding new tools and channels, (3) How does the WhatsApp bridge work (Baileys Node.js, WebSocket to Python), (4) What are the limitations of current file/shell tools, (5) Session and memory management, (6) Configuration system. Focus on identifying what we DON'T need to build vs what we DO need to build.
